question: Explain the experience of Bhavishya Gupta
answer:
Bhavishya Gupta is a Computer Science undergraduate specializing in AI & ML, with skills in full-stack development. Gupta is proficient in programming languages such as C++, Java, Python, JavaScript, Node.js, and React, and has experience with MongoDB. Gupta's expertise spans the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), including strong fundamentals in Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) and Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), having solved over 740 problems [1].

Gupta's technical toolkit includes frameworks like React.js, Node.js, and Express.js, and databases such as MySQL, MongoDB, and NoSQL. Gupta also has experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP), specifically Firebase and Firestore. Other tools and DevOps skills include Git, GitHub, VS Code, Windows, and Linux. Core skills encompass Data Structures & Algorithms, OOP, SDLC, Operating Systems, DBMS, Computer Networks, and Debugging. Gupta also possesses soft skills such as communication, leadership, teamwork, adaptability, and continuous learning [2].

Gupta has work experience as a Data Analyst Intern at Samatrix Consulting Private Limited from June 2025 to July 2025 [2].

Attention Is All You Need

# Attention Is All You Need

The dominant sequence transduction models are based on complex recurrent or convolutional neural networks that include an encoder and a decoder. The best performing models also connect the encoder and decoder through an attention mechanism.
